name: Manison #27
description: Fargh al-Muakhir, 'The Second Spout,' ruled by Mercury, represents the second and final outpouring of celestial wisdom and communication. Particularly favorable for learning, teaching, and transmitting sacred knowledge. Gamma Pegasi and Alpha Andromedae form the second spout, completing the cosmic outpouring. The generative artwork renders these stars in Mercury's luminous quicksilver palette, with cascading geometric patterns representing the flow of divine wisdom and spiritual transmission.

attributes.value: Learning, teaching, transmitting knowledge, studying sacred texts, communication
